title: Documentation quality gate
description: Docs index, manifest drift, and doc-contract consistency before merge.
requiredEvidence: verify-docs-index JSON status ok (or warn only from allowedWarnings)
verify-doc-contract-consistency JSON status ok (or allowed warn)
verify-compatibility JSON status ok (platform matrix vs script-manifest)
No unresolved doc-contract failures for touched markdown or manifests
strictModeBehavior: When -Strict is used by the evaluator, treat any validator envelope status other than ok as gate failure; allowedWarnings may match substring against envelope warnings or check names for documented benign cases only.
